gap_analysis_summary: Bootstrap-tag translation-unit authenticity is fresh again through ninja/ctest after the Homebrew LLVM repair, but alpha remains untouched because the fresh kilo primary route still fails closed before any task/subagent launch: the repo-local `.kilo` cast is subagent-only, the valid `--agent ask --model opencode/gpt-5-codex` route dies on outbound opencode connectivity, and there is no usable localhost model fallback on this host
implemented_components: selfhost/bootstrap_tags.cpp - Integer tag constants that build
selfhost/rbcursive.cpp2 - Pure cpp2 scanner/combinator nucleus with atlas/manifold/chart/transition/join feature-stream coverage

selfhost_rbcursive_smoke - cppfront-boosted dogfood target and ctest case covering atlas/manifold, coords/local literals, chart contains/project/embed clauses, transition expressions, and join diagnostics

missing_components: Alpha transformation surface in selfhost bootstrap
MLIR SoN dialect compilation - blocked by LLVM 21 FieldParser issue
CAS internment implementation - no active selfhost path yet

honest_note: The bootstrap-tag translation-unit edits in `src/selfhost/rbcursive.cpp2`, `tests/selfhost_rbcursive_smoke.cpp`, and `src/selfhost/CMakeLists.txt` are still freshly authenticated on this host: `ninja -C build selfhost_rbcursive_smoke` and `ctest --test-dir build -R selfhost_rbcursive_smoke --output-on-failure` pass, and the direct `cppfront` + `clang++` fallback still passes through `/tmp/selfhost_rbcursive_smoke_manual`. The remaining blocker is delegated kilo runtime availability. The older user-requested kilo attempt with `XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/kilo-data kilo run --print-logs --auto --format json --dir /Users/jim/work/cppfort --agent compiler-architect ...` confirms the writable-db fix still holds, but also shows the repo-local `compiler-architect` entry is subagent-only, so kilo falls back to the default primary agent and then dies on outbound NVIDIA access for `https://integrate.api.nvidia.com/v1/chat/completions` (`ConnectionRefused` / `FailedToOpenSocket`) before any worker rendezvous or repo edit. A fresh conductor retry on 2026-03-14 with `XDG_DATA_HOME=/tmp/kilo-data kilo run --print-logs --auto --format json --dir /Users/jim/work/cppfort --agent ask --model opencode/gpt-5-codex ...` creates a real session against `/tmp/kilo-data/kilo/kilo.db`, loads the repo-local `.kilo` agent cast, and still fails before any task/subagent launch: the opencode title helper hits `https://opencode.ai/zen/v1/messages` (`ConnectionRefused`) and the primary route then fails on `https://opencode.ai/zen/v1/responses` (`FailedToOpenSocket`). `kilo models` still cannot fetch `https://api.kilo.ai/api/openrouter/models`, `ollama list` aborts locally with an MLX/Metal `NSRangeException`, and there is no localhost model server listening on `127.0.0.1:11434`, `127.0.0.1:1234`, or `127.0.0.1:8000`. Alpha remains the next untouched slice on `src/selfhost/rbcursive.cpp2` plus `tests/selfhost_rbcursive_smoke.cpp` until one delegated worker can actually execute.
